description:
A collection of Active Directory Tools to streamline Active Directory

Active Directory Pro Toolkit is an easy to use Active Directory Tools that makes managing Active Directory fast, easy and efficient. Automate tasks that are consuming your time and resources.
New Features
Section titled “New Features”
- Run scheduled tasks on demand: a new “Run Now” button on the Scheduled Reports page runs any task immediately so you can test it without waiting for its schedule. A live status column shows the task move from Queued to Running to Completed (or Failed, with the reason), and the Last Run time updates when it finishes.
Improvements
Section titled “Improvements”
- The Scheduled Reports list now shows the correct destination for each task: the folder path for “Save to Disk” tasks and the email recipients for email tasks (previously it could show a leftover email address on a Save to Disk task).
Bug Fixes
Section titled “Bug Fixes”
- Fixed the Duplicate/Conflicting GPOs report failing to load. It now resolves the domain correctly and reports a clear reason in the log if it cannot run.
